subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved of God! Upon thee rest My glory! The days of attainment unto the presence of the Lord, exalted be His majesty, hold over thee a mighty claim [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب الله علیک بهائی ایام حضور مذکور حضرت باری جل جلاله را بر تو حق عظیم است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat]
